title: Epical Thingies
description: An epic mod that adds a bunch of... Stuff! ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
body:
Epical Thingies is quite a simple mod, it adds a bunch of epic "*-"things"-*". These "things" each have their own cool uses and are great to just add a bit of fun and useful bits and bobs to your minecraft worlds and modpacks!

# Items:
## Edible:
### Living Steak:
A living piece of steak that lasts for an eternity, this does hurt the steak though so you will feel a bit guilty but only for a short while

### Artificial Flesh:
It's not rotten but it wont taste nice either. It is also used to create living beings that require some kind of organic casing.

### Cheese:
Very delicious and nice, Cheese. Nice. Yum :) It can also be used as a projectile for the cheese gun

### CHEESE OF ETERNAL FEEDING:
An eternal piece of cheese that is not currently obtainable in survival mode.

### Cheesy Ball
A delicious cheesy projectile used for the cheesezooka, very filling, very nice, very boom.

### Leaf
Why? It's not spinach.

### Chicken Wing
A tasty snack that will possibly grant you the ability to fly for a few seconds.

### AND MORE(probably)

## Weapons:
### Scissors:
Not a very effective weapon but it does do damage! also this can be used to cut certain items like, leaves, grass, tall grass and torches

### Sun Sword:
A standard sword that can shoot fireballs.

### Cheese Gun:
A rapid-fire, cheese shooting gun.

### Cheesezooka:
A slower version of the cheese gun that shoots cheesyballs, a new and explosive variant of cheese.

### Automatic Bow:
A rapid-fire version of the bow

### Spear:
A trident like item that cannot be used multiple times but is craftable

# Blocks:
### Wooden, Iron and ender crates are ways of storage exept wooden crates have gravity and DO NOT store items when the fall.

### Bin
It's a bin that voids anything put in the slot when clicked.

### Fluid barrel:
Store any liquid

### Ice making tank:
A version of the fluid barrel that only stores water but can turn it inot ice when clicked

And a few other trinkets with much more to come!
